text: The words<S>1697</S> of Amos<S>5986</S>, who was among the herdsmen<S>5349</S> of Tekoa<S>8620</S>, which he saw<S>2372</S> concerning Israel<S>3478</S> in the days<S>3117</S> of Uzziah<S>5818</S> king<S>4428</S> of Judah<S>3063</S>, and in the days<S>3117</S> of Jeroboam<S>3379</S> the son<S>1121</S> of Joash<S>3101</S> king<S>4428</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>, two years<S>8141</S> before<S>6440</S> the earthquake<S>7494</S>.

And he said<S>559</S>, Jehovah<S>3068</S> will roar<S>7580</S> from Zion<S>6726</S>, and utter<S>5414</S> his voice<S>6963</S> from Jerusalem<S>3389</S>; and the pastures<S>4999</S> of the shepherds<S>7462</S> shall mourn<S>56</S>, and the top<S>7218</S> of Carmel<S>3760</S> shall wither<S>3001</S>.

Thus saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>: For three<S>7969</S> transgressions<S>6588</S> of Damascus<S>1834</S>, yea<S>702</S>, for four, I will not turn away<S>7725</S> the punishment thereof<S>1758</S>; because they have threshed Gilead<S>1568</S> with threshing instruments<S>2742</S> of iron<S>1270</S>:
but I will send<S>7971</S> a fire<S>784</S> into the house<S>1004</S> of Hazael<S>2371</S>, and it shall devour<S>398</S> the palaces<S>759</S> of Ben-hadad<S>1130</S>.

And I will break<S>7665</S> the bar<S>1280</S> of Damascus<S>1834</S>, and cut off<S>3772</S> the inhabitant<S>3427</S> from the valley<S>1237</S> of Aven<S>206</S>, and him that holdeth<S>8551</S> the sceptre<S>7626</S> from the house<S>1004</S> of Eden<S>5731</S>; and the people<S>5971</S> of Syria<S>758</S> shall go into captivity<S>1540</S> unto Kir<S>7024</S>, saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>.

Thus saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>: For three<S>7969</S> transgressions<S>6588</S> of Gaza<S>5804</S>, yea<S>702</S>, for four, I will not turn away<S>7725</S> the punishment thereof<S>1540</S>; because they carried away captive the whole<S>8003</S> people<S>1546</S>, to deliver them up<S>5462</S> to Edom<S>123</S>.
But I will send<S>7971</S> a fire<S>784</S> on the wall<S>2346</S> of Gaza<S>5804</S>, and it shall devour<S>398</S> the palaces thereof<S>759</S>.

And I will cut off<S>3772</S> the inhabitant<S>3427</S> from Ashdod<S>795</S>, and him that holdeth<S>8551</S> the sceptre<S>7626</S> from Ashkelon<S>831</S>; and I will turn<S>7725</S> my hand<S>3027</S> against Ekron<S>6138</S>; and the remnant<S>7611</S> of the Philistines<S>6430</S> shall perish<S>6</S>, saith<S>559</S> the Lord<S>136</S> Jehovah<S>3069</S>.

Thus saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>: For three<S>7969</S> transgressions<S>6588</S> of Tyre<S>6865</S>, yea<S>702</S>, for four, I will not turn away<S>7725</S> the punishment thereof<S>5462</S>; because they delivered up the whole<S>8003</S> people<S>1546</S> to Edom<S>123</S>, and remembered<S>2142</S> not the brotherly<S>251</S> covenant<S>1285</S>:
but I will send<S>7971</S> a fire<S>784</S> on the wall<S>2346</S> of Tyre<S>6865</S>, and it shall devour<S>398</S> the palaces thereof<S>759</S>.

Thus saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>: For three<S>7969</S> transgressions<S>6588</S> of Edom<S>123</S>, yea<S>702</S>, for four, I will not turn away<S>7725</S> the punishment thereof<S>7291</S>; because he did pursue his brother<S>251</S> with the sword<S>2719</S>, and did cast off<S>7843</S> all pity<S>7356</S>, and his anger<S>639</S> did tear<S>2963</S> perpetually<S>5703</S>, and he kept<S>8104</S> his wrath<S>5678</S> for ever<S>5331</S>:
but I will send<S>7971</S> a fire<S>784</S> upon Teman<S>8487</S>, and it shall devour<S>398</S> the palaces<S>759</S> of Bozrah<S>1224</S>.

Thus saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>: For three<S>7969</S> transgressions<S>6588</S> of the children<S>1121</S> of Ammon<S>5983</S>, yea<S>702</S>, for four, I will not turn away<S>7725</S> the punishment thereof<S>1234</S>; because they have ripped up the women with child<S>2030</S> of Gilead<S>1568</S>, that they may enlarge<S>7337</S> their border<S>1366</S>.

But I will kindle<S>3341</S> a fire<S>784</S> in the wall<S>2346</S> of Rabbah<S>7237</S>, and it shall devour<S>398</S> the palaces<S>759</S> thereof<S>8643</S>, with shouting in the day<S>3117</S> of battle<S>4421</S>, with a tempest<S>5591</S> in the day<S>3117</S> of the whirlwind<S>5492</S>;
and their king<S>4428</S> shall go<S>1980</S> into captivity<S>1473</S>, he and his princes<S>8269</S> together<S>3162</S>, saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>.

Thus saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>: For three<S>7969</S> transgressions<S>6588</S> of Moab<S>4124</S>, yea<S>702</S>, for four, I will not turn away<S>7725</S> the punishment thereof<S>8313</S>; because he burned the bones<S>6106</S> of the king<S>4428</S> of Edom<S>123</S> into lime<S>7875</S>:

but I will send<S>7971</S> a fire<S>784</S> upon Moab<S>4124</S>, and it shall devour<S>398</S> the palaces<S>759</S> of Kerioth<S>7152</S>; and Moab<S>4124</S> shall die<S>4191</S> with tumult<S>7588</S>, with shouting<S>8643</S>, and with the sound<S>6963</S> of the trumpet<S>7782</S>;
and I will cut off<S>3772</S> the judge<S>8199</S> from the midst<S>7130</S> thereof<S>2026</S>, and will slay all the princes<S>8269</S> thereof with him<S>559</S>, saith Jehovah<S>3068</S>.

Thus saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>: For three<S>7969</S> transgressions<S>6588</S> of Judah<S>3063</S>, yea<S>702</S>, for four, I will not turn away<S>7725</S> the punishment thereof<S>3988</S>; because they have rejected the law<S>8451</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>, and have not kept<S>8104</S> his statutes<S>2706</S>, and their lies<S>3577</S> have caused them to err<S>8582</S>, after<S>310</S> which their fathers<S>1</S> did walk<S>1980</S>:
but I will send<S>7971</S> a fire<S>784</S> upon Judah<S>3063</S>, and it shall devour<S>398</S> the palaces<S>759</S> of Jerusalem<S>3389</S>.

Thus saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>: For three<S>7969</S> transgressions<S>6588</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>, yea<S>702</S>, for four, I will not turn away<S>7725</S> the punishment thereof<S>4376</S>; because they have sold the righteous<S>6662</S> for silver<S>3701</S>, and the needy<S>34</S> for a pair of shoes<S>5275</S>—

they that pant<S>7602</S> after the dust<S>6083</S> of the earth<S>776</S> on the head<S>7218</S> of the poor<S>1800</S>, and turn aside<S>5186</S> the way<S>1870</S> of the meek<S>6035</S>: and a man<S>376</S> and his father<S>1</S> go<S>3212</S> unto the same maiden<S>5291</S>, to profane<S>2490</S> my holy<S>6944</S> name<S>8034</S>:

and they lay themselves down<S>5186</S> beside<S>681</S> every altar<S>4196</S> upon clothes<S>899</S> taken in pledge<S>2254</S>; and in the house<S>1004</S> of their God<S>430</S> they drink<S>8354</S> the wine<S>3196</S> of such as have been fined<S>6064</S>.

Yet destroyed<S>8045</S> I the Amorite<S>567</S> before<S>6440</S> them<S>1363</S>, whose height was like the height<S>1363</S> of the cedars<S>730</S>, and he was strong<S>2634</S> as the oaks<S>437</S>; yet I destroyed<S>8045</S> his fruit<S>6529</S> from above<S>4605</S>, and his roots from beneath<S>8328</S>.

Also I brought you up<S>5927</S> out of the land<S>776</S> of Egypt<S>4714</S>, and led<S>3212</S> you forty<S>705</S> years<S>8141</S> in the wilderness<S>4057</S>, to possess<S>3423</S> the land<S>776</S> of the Amorite<S>567</S>.

And I raised up<S>6965</S> of your sons<S>1121</S> for prophets<S>5030</S>, and of your young men<S>970</S> for Nazirites<S>5139</S>. Is it not even thus<S>1121</S>, O ye children of Israel<S>3478</S>? saith<S>5002</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>.
But ye gave the Nazirites<S>5139</S> wine<S>3196</S> to drink<S>8248</S>, and commanded<S>6680</S> the prophets<S>5030</S>, saying<S>559</S>, Prophesy not<S>5012</S>.
Behold<S>5781</S>, I will press you in your place<S>5699</S>, as a cart presseth<S>5781</S> that is full<S>4392</S> of sheaves<S>5995</S>.

And flight<S>4498</S> shall perish<S>6</S> from the swift<S>7031</S>; and the strong<S>2389</S> shall not strengthen<S>553</S> his force<S>3581</S>; neither shall the mighty<S>1368</S> deliver<S>4422</S> himself<S>5315</S>;

neither shall he stand<S>5975</S> that handleth<S>8610</S> the bow<S>7198</S>; and he that is swift<S>7031</S> of foot<S>7272</S> shall not deliver<S>4422</S> himself<S>7392</S>; neither shall he that rideth the horse<S>5483</S> deliver<S>4422</S> himself<S>5315</S>;
and he that is courageous<S>533</S> among the mighty<S>1368</S> shall flee away<S>5127</S> naked<S>6174</S> in that day<S>3117</S>, saith<S>5002</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>.

Hear<S>8085</S> this word<S>1697</S> that Jehovah<S>3068</S> hath spoken<S>1696</S> against you<S>1121</S>, O children of Israel<S>3478</S>, against the whole family<S>4940</S> which I brought up<S>5927</S> out of the land<S>776</S> of Egypt<S>4714</S>, saying<S>559</S>,
You only have I known<S>3045</S> of all the families<S>4940</S> of the earth<S>127</S>: therefore I will visit<S>6485</S> upon you all your iniquities<S>5771</S>.
Shall two<S>8147</S> walk<S>3212</S> together<S>3162</S>, except<S>1115</S> they have agreed<S>3259</S>?

Will a lion<S>738</S> roar<S>7580</S> in the forest<S>3293</S>, when he hath no prey<S>2964</S>? will a young lion<S>3715</S> cry out<S>5414</S> of his den<S>4585</S>, if he have taken<S>3920</S> nothing<S>1115</S>?

Can a bird<S>6833</S> fall<S>5307</S> in a snare<S>6341</S> upon the earth<S>776</S>, where no gin<S>4170</S> is set for him<S>6341</S>? shall a snare spring up<S>5927</S> from the ground<S>127</S>, and have taken<S>3920</S> nothing at all<S>3920</S>?

Shall the trumpet<S>7782</S> be blown<S>8628</S> in a city<S>5892</S>, and the people<S>5971</S> not be afraid<S>2729</S>? shall evil<S>7451</S> befall a city<S>5892</S>, and Jehovah<S>3068</S> hath not done it<S>6213</S>?
Surely the Lord<S>136</S> Jehovah<S>3069</S> will do<S>6213</S> nothing<S>1697</S>, except he reveal his secret<S>5475</S> unto his servants<S>5650</S> the prophets<S>5030</S>.
The lion<S>738</S> hath roared<S>7580</S>; who will not<S>3808</S> fear<S>3372</S>? The Lord<S>136</S> Jehovah<S>3069</S> hath spoken<S>1696</S>; who can but prophesy<S>5012</S>?

Publish<S>8085</S> ye in the palaces<S>759</S> at Ashdod<S>795</S>, and in the palaces<S>759</S> in the land<S>776</S> of Egypt<S>4714</S>, and say<S>559</S>, Assemble<S>622</S> yourselves upon the mountains<S>2022</S> of Samaria<S>8111</S>, and behold<S>7200</S> what great<S>7227</S> tumults<S>4103</S> are therein<S>7130</S>, and what oppressions<S>6217</S> in the midst thereof<S>7130</S>.
For they know<S>3045</S> not to do<S>6213</S> right<S>5229</S>, saith<S>5002</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>, who store<S>686</S> up violence<S>2555</S> and robbery<S>7701</S> in their palaces<S>759</S>.

Therefore thus saith<S>559</S> the Lord<S>136</S> Jehovah<S>3069</S>: An adversary<S>6862</S> there shall be<S>5439</S>, even round about the land<S>776</S>; and he shall bring down<S>3381</S> thy strength<S>5797</S> from thee<S>759</S>, and thy palaces shall be plundered<S>962</S>.

Thus saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>: As the shepherd<S>7462</S> rescueth out<S>5337</S> of the mouth<S>6310</S> of the lion<S>738</S> two<S>8147</S> legs<S>3767</S>, or a piece<S>915</S> of an ear<S>241</S>, so shall the children<S>1121</S> of Israel<S>3478</S> be rescued<S>5337</S> that sit<S>3427</S> in Samaria<S>8111</S> in the corner<S>6285</S> of a couch<S>4296</S>, and on the silken cushions<S>1833</S> of a bed<S>4296</S>.
Hear<S>8085</S> ye<S>5749</S>, and testify against the house<S>1004</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S>, saith<S>5002</S> the Lord<S>136</S> Jehovah<S>3069</S>, the God<S>430</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>.

For in the day<S>3117</S> that I shall visit<S>6485</S> the transgressions<S>6588</S> of Israel<S>3478</S> upon him<S>6485</S>, I will also visit the altars<S>4196</S> of Beth-el<S>1008</S>; and the horns<S>7161</S> of the altar<S>4196</S> shall be cut off<S>1438</S>, and fall<S>5307</S> to the ground<S>776</S>.

And I will smite<S>5221</S> the winter<S>2779</S> - house<S>1004</S> with the summer<S>7019</S> - house<S>1004</S>; and the houses<S>1004</S> of ivory<S>8127</S> shall perish<S>6</S>, and the great<S>7227</S> houses<S>1004</S> shall have an end<S>5486</S>, saith<S>5002</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>.

Hear<S>8085</S> this word<S>1697</S>, ye kine<S>6510</S> of Bashan<S>1316</S>, that are in the mountain<S>2022</S> of Samaria<S>8111</S>, that oppress<S>6231</S> the poor<S>1800</S>, that crush<S>7533</S> the needy<S>34</S>, that say<S>559</S> unto their lords<S>113</S>, Bring<S>935</S>, and let us drink<S>8354</S>.

The Lord<S>136</S> Jehovah<S>3069</S> hath sworn<S>7650</S> by his holiness<S>6944</S>, that<S>3117</S>, lo, the days shall come<S>935</S> upon you<S>5375</S>, that they shall take you away with hooks<S>6793</S>, and your residue<S>319</S> with fish-hooks<S>1729</S>.

And ye shall go out<S>3318</S> at the breaches<S>6556</S>, every<S>802</S> one straight before her<S>7993</S>; and ye shall cast yourselves into Harmon<S>2038</S>, saith<S>5002</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>.

Come<S>935</S> to Beth-el<S>1008</S>, and transgress<S>6586</S>; to Gilgal<S>1537</S>, and multiply<S>7235</S> transgression<S>6586</S>; and bring<S>935</S> your sacrifices<S>2077</S> every morning<S>1242</S>, and your tithes<S>4643</S> every three<S>7969</S> days<S>3117</S>;

and offer<S>6999</S> a sacrifice of thanksgiving<S>8426</S> of that which is leavened<S>2557</S>, and proclaim<S>7121</S> freewill-offerings<S>5071</S> and publish<S>8085</S> them<S>3651</S>: for this pleaseth<S>157</S> you<S>1121</S>, O ye children of Israel<S>3478</S>, saith<S>5002</S> the Lord<S>136</S> Jehovah<S>3069</S>.

And I also have given<S>5414</S> you cleanness<S>5356</S> of teeth<S>8127</S> in all your cities<S>5892</S>, and want<S>2640</S> of bread<S>3899</S> in all your places<S>4725</S>; yet have ye not returned<S>7725</S> unto me<S>5002</S>, saith Jehovah<S>3068</S>.

And I also have withholden<S>4513</S> the rain<S>1653</S> from you<S>7969</S>, when there were yet three months<S>2320</S> to the harvest<S>7105</S>; and I caused it to rain<S>4305</S> upon one<S>259</S> city<S>5892</S>, and caused it not to rain<S>4305</S> upon another<S>259</S> city<S>5892</S>: one<S>259</S> piece<S>2513</S> was rained<S>4305</S> upon<S>2513</S>, and the piece whereupon it rained<S>4305</S> not withered<S>3001</S>.

So two<S>8147</S> or three<S>7969</S> cities<S>5892</S> wandered<S>5128</S> unto one<S>259</S> city<S>5892</S> to drink<S>8354</S> water<S>4325</S>, and were not satisfied<S>7646</S>: yet have ye not returned<S>7725</S> unto me<S>5002</S>, saith Jehovah<S>3068</S>.

I have smitten<S>5221</S> you with blasting<S>7711</S> and mildew<S>3420</S>: the multitude<S>7235</S> of your gardens<S>1593</S> and your vineyards<S>3754</S> and your fig-trees<S>2132</S> and your olive-trees<S>8384</S> hath the palmer-worm<S>1501</S> devoured<S>398</S>: yet have ye not returned<S>7725</S> unto me<S>5002</S>, saith Jehovah<S>3068</S>.

I have sent<S>7971</S> among you the pestilence<S>1698</S> after the manner<S>1870</S> of Egypt<S>4714</S>: your young men<S>970</S> have I slain<S>2026</S> with the sword<S>2719</S>, and have carried away<S>7628</S> your horses<S>5483</S>; and I have made the stench<S>889</S> of your camp<S>4264</S> to come up<S>5927</S> even into your nostrils<S>639</S>: yet have ye not returned<S>7725</S> unto me<S>5002</S>, saith Jehovah<S>3068</S>.

I have overthrown<S>2015</S> cities among you<S>430</S>, as when God overthrew<S>4114</S> Sodom<S>5467</S> and Gomorrah<S>6017</S>, and ye were as a brand<S>181</S> plucked out<S>5337</S> of the burning<S>8316</S>: yet have ye not returned<S>7725</S> unto me<S>5002</S>, saith Jehovah<S>3068</S>.

Therefore thus will I do<S>6213</S> unto thee<S>3478</S>, O Israel; and because<S>6118</S> I will do<S>6213</S> this unto thee<S>3559</S>, prepare to meet<S>7125</S> thy God<S>430</S>, O Israel<S>3478</S>.

For<S>3335</S>, lo, he that formeth the mountains<S>2022</S>, and createth<S>1254</S> the wind<S>7307</S>, and declareth<S>5046</S> unto man<S>120</S> what is his thought<S>7808</S>; that maketh<S>6213</S> the morning<S>7837</S> darkness<S>5890</S>, and treadeth<S>1869</S> upon the high places<S>1116</S> of the earth<S>776</S>— Jehovah<S>3068</S>, the God<S>430</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>, is his name<S>8034</S>.
Hear<S>8085</S> ye this word<S>1697</S> which I take up<S>5375</S> for a lamentation<S>7015</S> over you<S>1004</S>, O house of Israel<S>3478</S>.

The virgin<S>1330</S> of Israel<S>3478</S> is fallen<S>5307</S>; she shall no more<S>3254</S> rise<S>6965</S>: she is cast down<S>5203</S> upon her land<S>127</S>; there is none to raise her up<S>6965</S>.

For thus saith<S>559</S> the Lord<S>136</S> Jehovah<S>3069</S>: The city<S>5892</S> that went forth<S>3318</S> a thousand<S>505</S> shall have a hundred<S>3967</S> left<S>7604</S>, and that which went forth<S>3318</S> a hundred<S>3967</S> shall have ten<S>6235</S> left<S>7604</S>, to the house<S>1004</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>.
For thus saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S> unto the house<S>1004</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>, Seek<S>1875</S> ye me<S>2421</S>, and ye shall live;

but seek<S>1875</S> not Beth-el<S>1008</S>, nor enter<S>935</S> into Gilgal<S>1537</S>, and pass<S>5674</S> not to Beer-sheba<S>884</S>: for Gilgal<S>1537</S> shall surely<S>1540</S> go into captivity<S>1540</S>, and Beth-el<S>1008</S> shall come to nought<S>205</S>.

Seek<S>1875</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>, and ye shall live<S>2421</S>; lest he break out<S>6743</S> like fire<S>784</S> in the house<S>1004</S> of Joseph<S>3130</S>, and it devour<S>398</S>, and there be none to quench<S>3518</S> it in Beth-el<S>1008</S>.
Ye who turn<S>2015</S> justice<S>4941</S> to wormwood<S>3939</S>, and cast down<S>3240</S> righteousness<S>6666</S> to the earth<S>776</S>,
